name: @pryzm/typology-pack-casa-unifamiliar
description: A.21.a — Casa Unifamiliar (single-family house) typology pack. The SECOND typology + first multi-storey. Ships the C50-compliant TypologyManifest + house brief (floors stepper) + minimal bridge TypologyStageBundle so the typology appears in the picker/RAC and `runtime.typology.router.dispatch({ typologyId: 'casa-unifamiliar', ... })` is callable. The multi-storey generator + stair auto-placement land in A.21.c-A.21.x. See docs/03-execution/specs/SPEC-CASA-UNIFAMILIAR-TYPOLOGY.md.
